implementation_summary.summary: CP00-885 closes the RP29 Commercial Readiness P05 fixture tail and opens the P06 permission-matrix foundation across RP29.P05.M06.S14-RP29.P06.M03.S22. It binds synthetic fixture closeout, test/golden, Hermes, Claude, closeout, no-real-data, permission matrix, view/search/mutation/export/share/AI retrieval decisions, audit hints, matched-rule capture, deny-over-allow, legal hold, ethical wall, object ACL, review/approval routes, security trimming, audit expectation, allowed/denied/cross-tenant/leak-prevention tests, and keeps all rows descriptor-only with no permission decision writes, audit-event writes, runtime test execution, rule-secret exposure, unauthorized data, real client data, credentials, secrets, or product-state writes.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-885 RP29.P05.M06.S14-RP29.P06.M03.S22 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
